name: M5Stack Passive Node
description: ESP32-based multi-sensor node with LEDs, buzzer, IMU, battery, and microphone.

capabilities.name: Vibrate Alert
capabilities.description: Triggers haptic vibration and red LED flash.

capabilities.name: Hardware Demo
capabilities.description: Runs a 2-second rainbow LED animation, vibration, and buzzer tones.

capabilities.name: Beep Speaker
capabilities.description: Plays a tone at a specified frequency on the speaker.

capabilities.name: Read Battery
capabilities.description: Reads the battery percentage and voltage.

capabilities.name: Read IMU
capabilities.description: Reads the accelerometer data and temperature.

capabilities.name: Read Sound dB
capabilities.description: Reads the sound pressure level in dB from the microphone.

capabilities.name: Read All Sensors
capabilities.description: Reads all telemetry data (battery, IMU, sound) at once.

name: Jetson Nano AI Node
description: Agentic AI subsystem capable of advanced reasoning, web search, visual inspection, and general conversation.

capabilities.name: General Agent Request
capabilities.description: Answers natural-language questions by searching/browsing via the active device pipeline. Can be used for general chat, explanations, and saying hello.
capabilities.system_prompt:
[SYSTEM PROMPT]
You are Aether, a friendly and helpful AI assistant. Your primary function is to help users by searching the internet for answers to their general queries.
[SYSTEM CONTEXT]
You have access to the DuckDuckGo internet search tool. Use it whenever you need to find up-to-date information to answer the user's question.
[USER CONTEXT]
The user's specific context sent via the x402 API.

name: Robotic Arm
description: 4-DOF physical robotic manipulator capable of moving to coordinates and actuating a gripper.

capabilities.name: Arm Home
capabilities.description: Smoothly returns all joints to the home (90-degree) pose.

capabilities.name: Arm Reach Center
capabilities.description: Moves the robotic arm to the center forward workspace waypoint.

capabilities.name: Arm Reach Left
capabilities.description: Moves the robotic arm to the left workspace waypoint.

capabilities.name: Arm Reach Right
capabilities.description: Moves the robotic arm to the right workspace waypoint.

capabilities.name: Arm Move Coordinates
capabilities.description: Executes trajectory to move the arm to x, y, z cartesian coordinates with pitch.

capabilities.name: Arm Gripper Control
capabilities.description: Actuates the gripper claw by setting closure percent (0% open to 100% closed).
